archetype: 1 (Organic & Earthy) with a Professional Swiss influence
design_philosophy: A highly professional, clean, and trustworthy real estate auction platform resembling sahibinden.com. Strictly avoiding harsh black borders, replacing them with soft shadows, structural whitespace, and subtle slate dividers. The emerald green brand color drives all primary actions to instill trust and growth.

surfaces_and_borders.cards: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-[0_2px_10px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-slate-100 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-all duration-300
surfaces_and_borders.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-100 shadow-sm
surfaces_and_borders.inputs: bg-white border-slate-200 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/20 focus:border-emerald-500 transition-colors

layout_strategies.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-6 to p-8 for standard cards, p-12 for hero sections.
layout_strategies.listing_grid: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6

detail_page.container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8

button.primary: bg-emerald-600 text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium hover:bg-emerald-700 shadow-sm hover:shadow transition-all
button.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium hover:bg-slate-50 hover:border-slate-300 transition-all

table.wrapper: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100 overflow-hidden
table.header: bg-slate-50/80 text-slate-600 font-semibold text-sm py-3 px-4

images.description: Cultivated land rows under blue sky
Wooden gavel symbolizing auctions and legal authority

testing.instructions: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Use kebab-case, role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='submit-bid-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly avoid any border-black or ring-black classes. Replace all harsh lines with border-slate-100 or soft shadow-sm.
Use Manrope for all Headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Keep the parcel detail page layout identical in structure (Left side images, Right side table) but upgrade the UI to use the 'surfaces_and_borders' guidelines.
Ensure the header is sticky with a glassmorphism effect (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80).
Use emerald-600 for primary buttons and accents, keeping the existing brand identity intact.
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a professional and clean icon set.
